# Pull Request: Fix All Repository Issues and Add Infrastructure\n\n## Description\n\nThis PR adds all missing dependencies and infrastructure to fix the Textify1 repository and make it production-ready.\n\n## Changes\n\n### Core Hooks\n- ✅ `src/hooks/useLayerState.ts` - Layer state management with selection, styling, and text updates\n- ✅ `src/hooks/useEditorStore.ts` - Editor navigation and routing\n- ✅ `src/_core/hooks/useAuth.ts` - Authentication with user management\n\n### Library Files\n- ✅ `src/lib/layerSystem.ts` - Complete layer system with types and utilities\n- ✅ `src/lib/trpc.ts` - TRPC client configuration\n\n### UI Components\n- ✅ `src/components/ui/button.tsx` - Reusable button component with variants\n- ✅ `src/components/EditorErrorBoundary.tsx` - Error boundary for editor\n- ✅ `src/components/EditorHeader.tsx` - Editor header component\n- ✅ `src/components/CanvasArea.tsx` - Canvas/image display area\n- ✅ `src/components/EditorSidebar.tsx` - Editor sidebar for properties\n\n### Testing Infrastructure\n- ✅ `jest.config.js` - Jest configuration\n- ✅ `src/test/setup.ts` - Jest setup with DOM testing library\n- ✅ Test files for components and utilities\n\n### CI/CD Workflows\n- ✅ `.github/workflows/test.yml` - Automated testing on Node 18.x and 20.x\n- ✅ `.github/workflows/build.yml` - Build verification and type checking\n\n### Documentation\n- ✅ Updated `README.md` with complete documentation\n- ✅ Added project structure guide\n- ✅ Added testing and CI/CD information\n\n### Dependencies\n- ✅ Updated `package.json` with testing dependencies\n- ✅ Added Jest, React Testing Library, ts-jest\n- ✅ Added @trpc/client for TRPC support\n\n## What's Fixed\n\n✅ All missing imports now resolve correctly  \n✅ Application can now compile without errors  \n✅ Complete testing infrastructure in place  \n✅ Automated CI/CD pipelines configured  \n✅ Professional project structure established  \n✅ Comprehensive documentation added  \n\n## Testing\n\n```bash\nnpm install\nnpm test\nnpm run build\n```\n\nAll tests pass ✅  \nBuild succeeds ✅  \nNo TypeScript errors ✅  \n\n## Related Issues\n\nFixes all import resolution errors  \nImplements testing infrastructure  \nSets up CI/CD automation  \n\n## Checklist\n\n- [x] All imports resolve\n- [x] TypeScript compiles without errors\n- [x] Tests pass\n- [x] Build succeeds\n- [x] Documentation updated\n- [x] Code follows project conventions\n"
